readings.citation:
Ps 104:1–2, 24, 35, 27–30
Lord, send out your Spirit, and renew the face of the earth.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 104:1–2, 24, 35, 27–30
Lord, send out your Spirit, and renew the face of the earth.

readings.summary:
Come, Holy Spirit, fill the hearts of your faithful
and kindle in them the fire of your love.

antiphons.text:
The love of God has been poured into our hearts
through the Spirit of God dwelling within us, alleluia.

On the last day of the festival, Jesus stood and cried out:
If anyone is thirsty, let him come to me and drink, alleluia.

prelude.title: Regina Caeli / O Queen of Heaven
prelude.description: Pope Leo XIV singing Regina Caeli

gathering.title: Veni, Creator Spiritus
gathering.description: Translation: Come, Holy Spirit, Creator blest...

penitentialAct.title: Kyrie • Misa Del Mundo
penitentialAct.composer: Only if needed. Talk to presider!

gospelAcclamation.verse:
Come, Holy Spirit, fill the hearts of your faithful
and kindle in them the fire of your love.

offertory.title: Send out Your Spirit
offertory.composer: Bernadette Farrell • Jo Routh • Kevin Walsh

fractionRite.title: Lamb of God (Mass of the Holy Family)

communionSongs.title: Spirit and Grace
communionSongs.description: You are wind that breathes through the field

communionSongs.title: I, The Lord
communionSongs.description: "I will lead you home... follow me"

sending.title: O Breathe on Me, O Breath of God
